clusters.justification: This cluster reflects the macroscopic processing of somatic states, emotional valence, and homeostatic arousal typically subserved by the anterior insula, cingulate, and broader limbic-salience networks.

These terms map onto the cortico-striatal and orbitofrontal brain circuitries responsible for reward anticipation, motivation, and the computation of subjective value during goal-directed decision making.
This cluster captures the self-other functional axis mediated by the Default Mode Network, integrating internally directed self-referential representations with interpersonal evaluation and empathy.
